goal: submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) = forall(x0: K) { module_hom_image[R, M, K](h).contains(x0) implies module_hom_image[R, N, K](f).contains(x0) }

p.c: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1: Ring](x0: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0], x1: lib(submodule).Submodule[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = submodule_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[K, R](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))
not submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) or forall(x0: K) { not x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, M, K](h) or x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, N, K](f) } = true
(forall(x0: K) { not (x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, M, K](h) and not x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) or not submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f)) })
not forall(x0: K) { not x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, M, K](h) or x0 ∈ module_hom_image[R, N, K](f) } or submodule_subset[R, K](module_hom_image[R, M, K](h), module_hom_image[R, N, K](f))

goal: is_surjective_fn[M, N](g.hom) = forall(x0: N) { exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[N, M](g.hom)
not is_surjective_fn[M, N](g.hom) or forall(x0: N) { exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } } = true
(forall(x0: N) { not is_surjective_fn[M, N](g.hom) or exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } })
(forall(x0: N) { exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } })
not forall(x0: N) { exists(k0: M) { g.hom(k0) = x0 } } or is_surjective_fn[M, N](g.hom)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1) { not is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: T0) { x0(k0) = x1 } }[M, N](g.hom, z)
